[Home](https://www.enventure.com/) About Us

# About Us

Enventure has been a trusted name in the industry since 1997, serving over 300 North American clients with a dedicated team of over 500 employees. We offer services in areas of Architecture, MEP, Plant Design, Oil and Gas, MRO, and Product Compliance. Our high Net Promoter Score of over 60 reflects our commitment to customer satisfaction.
We pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, tailored solutions. Our reputation for excellence is built on Reliable and high-quality solutions across various sectors. Our business grows through positive client references and recommendations.
With offices in Chicago, IL India and, we serve a diverse global client base, and our customer-centric approach ensures exceptional value and service.

### Key Facts

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Experience** | ### 25+ Years in Business |
| **Primary Markets** | ### USA, Canada, Europe, UK & Middle East |
| **Global Presense** | ### 300+ Global Clients |
| **Workforce** | ### 500+ Engineers |
| **Delivery** | ### 7 Mn+ Person hours delivered |
| **Quality Certification** | ### ISO 9001:2015 & 27001:2013 |
| **NPS Score** | ### 65 Average |

### Our Core Values

##### Fairness

##### Respect for Individual

##### Pride in Work

##### Efficiency

##### Prudence
